text:
For Candidates — Alice B. Toklas LGBTQ Democratic Club
0
June 2, 2026 Endorsements
The Alice B. Toklas LGBTQ Democratic Club makes endorsements on local, state, and federal candidates and measures in San Francisco.
As the nation’s oldest chartered LGBTQ Democratic Club, Alice is proud to endorse Democratic office-seekers and requires that all candidates seeking endorsement are registered Democrats.
Federal Candidates
US Representative, D11 - Scott Wiener
US Representative, D15 - Kevin Mullin
State and Regional Candidates
Governor - Xavier Becerra
Lieutenant Governor - Fiona Ma
Secretary of State - Shirley Weber
Controller - Malia Cohen
Treasurer - Eleni Kounalakis
Attorney General - Rob Bonta
Insurance Commissioner - No Position
State Superintendent of Public Instruction - No endorsement
Board of Equalization Member, District 2 - Sally Lieber
State Assemblymember, District 17 - Matt Haney
State Assemblymember, District 19 - Catherine Stefani
Local Candidates
Board of Education, 1 Seat - Phil Kim
Board of Supervisors, District 2 - Stephen Sherrill
Board of Supervisors, District 4 - Alan Wong
Superior Court Judge, Seat 16 - Phoebe Maffei
Local Ballot Measures
A - Earthquake Safety

and Emergency Response Bond - Yes
B - Lifetime Term Limits for Mayor and Members of the Board of Supervisors - Yes
C - Decreases to Business Taxes - No
D - Increases to Business Tax Based on Comparison of Top Executive's Pay to Employees' Pay - No
Endorsement Process
Ahead of each election in San Francisco, the Alice B. Toklas LGBTQ Democratic Club selects which candidates and causes to endorse through candidate questionnaires, a PAC Committee interview, a PAC Committee recommendation, and finally a vote of eligible membership.
For the November 2026 election, this process will take place in August 2026. Please contact pac@alicebtoklas.org with questions.
